description: S16 copy side-effect (state layer): send a self message, invoke the copy action, confirm it succeeds and is NON-destructive (message still present). The actual OS-clipboard byte check (pbpaste) is cross-process and asserted live during the run, not by this runner. Hermetic — no echo peer needed. #18: text carries a per-run {{nonce}} so the invoke_action text resolver finds a UNIQUE match even if a prior run left residue.
